label: Franchise Networks
criteria: Existing operational processes but limited visibility across locations
No modern HR platform deployed consistently across the network
operational_challenges: Scaling operations as the network grows
why_good: Head office often lacks visibility into day-to-day people management across the network
Processes become inconsistent as new locations are added
Franchisees often use different systems or spreadsheets
Vesra provides a central platform that standardises people management across the network
mission: Help franchise networks scale with confidence.
core_value_proposition: Give head office visibility and consistency across every location.
belief: Growing franchise networks need modern systems to maintain consistency, visibility, and control as they scale.

outreach.subject: Quick question
outreach.detail: appears to run or support a franchise network with multiple locations
outreach.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

I came across {company_name} and noticed you operate or support a franchise network.

As franchise networks grow, it often becomes harder for head office to keep visibility and consistency across holiday management, sickness tracking, employee records, policy acknowledgements, onboarding, and compliance.

Vesra helps franchise networks give head office a clearer, more consistent HR platform across locations without having to build or maintain software themselves.

The result is better operational control, lower admin burden, reduced compliance risk, and a more consistent employee experience across the network.

Would it be worth sending over a short overview?

Best,
Chris
